title: ourisia breviflora subsp. breviflora
intro: Ourisia breviflora subsp. breviflora, also known as the 'blue forget-me-not' or 'mini forget-me-not', is a species of flowering plant in the family Plantaginaceae. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including antibacterial and anti-inflammatory effects, which can be utilized to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Ourisia breviflora subsp. breviflora include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, allowing for a range of applications in traditional medicine.
